accepted_scope: Stage 3 tasks are accepted as 12 of 12 with six acceptance criteria passed and four stop conditions clear
the immutable real snapshot partitions 8815 records into 6879 published events and 1936 explicit review items with zero silent drops
all published records have complete redacted raw-to-ledger lineage and repeated import publishes zero additional ledger events
same economic event counting is limited to once per metric and five declared pages share one read model hash
Stage 4 entry is authorized but Stage 4 work production acceptance and final human acceptance are not included
known_defects: 1,250 条转账候选缺少明确关联或有效账户角色，未确认，只保留在 review queue
249 条退款候选缺少 offset economic event id，未确认，只保留在 review queue
来源时间只有日期粒度，UTC 日起点标准化不代表精确交易时间
review queue 持久化、生产估值输入和 production acceptance 不在本阶段范围
acceptance_statement: 用户在最终验收前提供持续的阶段授权；本记录仅接受 Stage 3 技术范围及已明确列出的残余风险，不构成 production 或最终人工验收。
